project_type: Android app (Sketchware Pro - an on-device visual app builder)
build_system: Gradle with Android plugin, Java 17, compileSdk 36, minSdk 26. Uses gradlew. Version catalog at gradle/libs.versions.toml
test_framework: No unit tests present in the project. CI only runs gradle assembleRelease.
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew assembleRelease (or assembleDebug) from project root. The CI workflow runs gradle assembleRelease with JDK 17.
snapshot_or_generated_files: public-stable-ids.txt is checked in and passed to aapt2. Do NOT modify it unless adding new resource IDs.
setup_instructions: 1. Ensure JDK 17 is active (mise use java@17). 2. Run ./gradlew assembleDebug from project root. The build creates a mock google-services.json automatically.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - can download dependencies. JDK 17 is available via mise. Android SDK is NOT installed on host - Gradle will download it via AGP. The build may need ANDROID_HOME set or the SDK to be downloaded. Since this is an Android project, full APK compilation requires the Android SDK which Gradle's AGP plugin will handle.
contribution_requirements: New features should go in pro.sketchware package (sub-packages). Use Java, not Kotlin. Commit types: feat:, fix:, refactor:, etc. Do NOT break existing drag-and-drop functionality.
key_patterns: Activities use ViewBinding (binding = XxxBinding.inflate(getLayoutInflater())). Layouts in app/src/main/res/layout/. Activities registered in AndroidManifest.xml. Project data stored as HashMap<String,Object> with fields like sc_id, my_ws_name, my_sc_pkg_name, my_app_name, sc_ver_code, sc_ver_name, proj_type. Projects stored on device at /storage/emulated/0/.sketchware/mysc/list/<sc_id>/project. Code editor uses sora-editor (io.github.rosemoe.sora.widget.CodeEditor) with EditorUtils for config. Existing editable editor: SrcCodeEditor with toolbar, save/undo/redo. ProjectBuilder orchestrates: AAPT2 resources -> ViewBinding -> Kotlin -> Java (ecj) -> StringFog -> ProGuard -> D8/Dx -> merge DEX -> build APK -> sign APK.
directory_structure: app/src/main/java/pro/sketchware/ - main package for new features (activities/, utility/, etc.). app/src/main/java/a/a/a/ - obfuscated core classes (ProjectBuilder, yq, lC, wq). app/src/main/java/com/besome/sketch/ - original Sketchware classes. app/src/main/java/mod/ - community mod contributions. app/src/main/res/layout/ - XML layouts. app/src/main/assets/ - bundled tools (aapt2, fonts, textmate grammars, etc.).
